title: MCS Sky Palace 3

ingest_warnings: 1.17+ downsample applied to 1 block ids: minecraft:jigsaw->minecraft:stone

description:
This large Chinese-style fantasy building features a complex, multi-tiered roof structure with a prominent L-shaped footprint, measuring approximately 17 blocks wide by 20 blocks deep and rising to 32 blocks high. The roof is predominantly red concrete, creating a striking visual, and is supported by an intricate framework of grey stone brick slabs and polished andesite. Several sections of the roof feature exposed stripped oak logs and spruce slabs, hinting at a sturdy internal structure. The lower sections of the building, visible beneath the roof, are constructed from birch planks and birch slabs, giving it a lighter, more delicate appearance compared to the heavy red roof. The overall impression is one of an ornate and expansive structure, possibly a palace or temple, designed with traditional East Asian architectural elements.

The interior layout, though not fully visible, suggests a multi-level design given its height. The use of birch planks and birch slabs for the visible lower walls indicates a preference for lighter wood tones in the interior, contrasting with the dominant red roof. The presence of numerous stone brick slabs and polished andesite within the roof structure implies a robust and perhaps decorative ceiling or attic space. Given the "Sky Palace" title and Chinese fantasy style, one might expect grand halls and ceremonial spaces, with circulation likely managed by a series of internal staircases connecting the various levels. The building's character leans towards the ceremonial and courtly, typical of large Chinese palatial architecture.
